title: Everybody Does It
writer: Nunnally Johnson, James M. Cain, Malcolm St. Clair
actors: Paul Douglas, Linda Darnell, Celeste Holm
plot: Leonard Borland loves his monied wife, but with his wrecking business looking shaky he treasures her all the more. So when she decides to try again to become an opera singer he indulges her. While organising a concert for her he m...
